global_blocker: Both required upstream packets lack independently reviewed outputs, and no current read-only or terminal grant was supplied. No live profile was run.

rows.schema_or_transcript: fixtures/file-tree.json proves stable bounded pages, empty and nested directories, and metadata classes only.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted sandbox list contract or current read grant.
rows.fallback: Use separately authorized exact commit metadata or a metadata-only source link; claim no file tree.

rows.schema_or_transcript: UTF-8, BOM, newline, binary, unknown, large, and truncation fallbacks are schema-tested before decode.
rows.fallback: Metadata only; authorized download handoff only if independently available.

rows.schema_or_transcript: NUL, absolute, traversal, backslash, symlink, guessed reference, wrong identity, expiry, and ambiguity cases fail before read.
rows.inherited_blocker: Provider opaque-reference and symlink semantics are unaccepted.
rows.fallback: Reject the request and return to metadata or source-native handoff.
rows.cleanup: No bytes leave the deterministic fake root.

rows.schema_or_transcript: MIME mismatch, polyglot, active markup, malformed media, decompression, dimensions, pages, bytes, and time are metadata-only negatives.
rows.fallback: Do not parse or render inline; show bounded metadata.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Version A metadata plus version B bytes is rejected as stale and never combined.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted provider version/checksum concurrency contract.
rows.fallback: Mark stale and require a fresh single-authority read.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Expiry makes mutable files unavailable; exact commit evidence remains a separate authority only.
rows.inherited_blocker: Sandbox TTL, deletion, restart, and permission-revocation rows are missing upstream.
rows.fallback: Show expired/unavailable and preserve only independently authorized immutable evidence.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Exact base/head, merge-base assumption, patch bytes, normalized file facts, and document checksum are cross-validated.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted exact GitHub repository/PR/base/head authority.
rows.fallback: Claim no diff; offer metadata-only exact source link when authorized.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Renamed, added binary, deleted no-newline, and modified hunks are exact; copied, type-change, and submodule remain unsupported.
rows.inherited_blocker: Provider status, quoting, pagination, and large-diff behavior are unaccepted.
rows.fallback: Show exact supported metadata only and fabricate no lines.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Head A evidence remains immutable after head B; an A-bound comment or mutation is blocked.
rows.inherited_blocker: No current GitHub ref/PR authority or mutation ledger.
rows.fallback: Mark anchors outdated and require review/remap against the new exact head.
rows.cleanup: No comment, PR, CI, or repository mutation performed.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Ordered stdout/stderr, exit, cursor, reconnect, truncation, and empty PTY controls are retained.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted upstream command transcript/session rows.
rows.fallback: terminal none until a real read-only transcript contract is accepted.

rows.schema_or_transcript: A discrete reviewed command is modeled as a separate audited action, never keystroke input.
rows.inherited_blocker: No current terminal grant and no accepted provider input operation.
rows.fallback: command input none; execute nothing on application, probe, or contributor hosts.

rows.schema_or_transcript: TTY allocation, resize, control sequences, input echo, lifetime, reconnect, and close are all unproven.
rows.contradiction: A transcript fixture must not be labelled interactive.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted PTY public contract or separate terminal grant.
rows.fallback: Expose no PTY controls and do not say live terminal.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Cross-actor/session, wrong origin, replay, expiry, concurrent controller, ANSI, OSC, link, bidi, and oversized controls fail closed.
rows.inherited_blocker: Channel authority, audience, expiry, and audit contract are unaccepted.
rows.fallback: Render bounded escaped plain text with no active links or input.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Returned and omitted bounds are explicit; retrieval stays an independently authorized source action.
rows.inherited_blocker: Provider output and retrieval limits are unaccepted.
rows.fallback: Show exact truncation and no guessed missing output.

rows.schema_or_transcript: Disconnect leaves process state unknown; it never claims stopped.
rows.inherited_blocker: Provider reconnect, cancel, close, expiry, and cleanup semantics are unaccepted.
rows.fallback: Show disconnected and reconcile before any stop or reconnect claim.

rows.schema_or_transcript: No session ID, capture provenance, screenshot hash, actor/controller, origin, freshness, event trail, expiry, or current authority exists.
rows.contradiction: A placeholder screenshot or model-authored timeline is not evidence.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted browser evidence contract; browser control is unauthorized.
rows.fallback: browser none; retain no screenshot or action timeline.
rows.cleanup: No browser session or evidence created.

rows.schema_or_transcript: No provider binding, allowed origin/port, audience, grant, TTL, refresh, revocation, redirect, or logging proof exists.
rows.contradiction: An ordinary external link conveys no browser-control or evidence contract.
rows.inherited_blocker: Sandbox egress/service URL rows and current grant are missing.
rows.fallback: Keep any ordinary destination labelled external link and never auto-open.

rows.schema_or_transcript: browser none yields no Browser evidence; an ordinary link remains external, requires confirmation, and is not auto-opened.
rows.inherited_blocker: No accepted browser evidence or service URL capability.
